title: bauhinia lingua var. riedelii
intro: Bauhinia lingua var. riedelii, also known as the Hong Kong orchid tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese traditional medicine, due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The roots and leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas for their medicinal properties.
